arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Walsall as Odsonne Edouard decision made amid 10 changes
arts.sum: Odsonne Edouard has been handed his first Leicester City start with Steve Cooper making 10 changes to the team to face Walsall. City (4-2-3-1): Ward; Ricardo, Coady, Okoli, Thomas; Choudhury, Soumare; Fatawu, Buonanotte, De Cordova-Reid; Edouard.

arts.ttl: Premier League announce referee for Arsenal vs Leicester who has already made an apology this season
arts.sum: Samuel Barrott has been appointed for Arsenal vs Leicester City this weekend and he's already made an apology this season.

arts.ttl: Walsall loan man from Birmingham City is a doubt for Leicester City tie
arts.sum: Walsall midfielder George Hall is a ‘doubt’ for their Carabao Cup clash against Leicester City, as detailed in… The post Walsall loan man from Birmingham City is a doubt for Leicester City tie appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: What Leicester City are getting right in search of first win - and what they're getting wrong - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: City have trailing at half-time in all three of their home matches, the only club in the division for which that is true. Those qualities in defending mean City have only conceded 25 shots on target so far, the same number as Chelsea and Crystal Palace and fewer than seven other sides in the division.

arts.ttl: Leicester City get £20m boost over Chelsea payment as King Power Stadium expansion date mooted
arts.sum: Rather than waiting for those payments, City have taken out a loan with Macquarie to receive them up front. Leicester City have again taken out loans with Australian bank Macquarie to aid cash flow at the club.

arts.ttl: Leicester City predicted line-up v Walsall with 10 changes on the cards
arts.sum: Wout Faes and Caleb Okoli played together at centre-back in the previous round, but with the duo establishing themselves as Cooper’s first-choice Premier League partnership, there’s potential that they will be rested ahead of the trip to Arsenal at the weekend. Odsonne Edouard is expected to make his first Leicester City start with Steve Cooper able to make 11 changes for Walsall if he desires.

arts.ttl: Lawyer who helped Leicester City in Premier League battle says Man City relegation would 'spoil the fun'
arts.sum: An independent panel sided with De Marco in the Foxes' battle with the Premier League, saying top-flight officials had no grounds to charge the club with financial breaches since City had been relegated and therefore were not members at the time. Yet, with Manchester City now facing up to 130 allegations of impropriety, there is speculation that the range of potential penalties is vast - ranging from fines, points deductions and even expulsion from the league they have won for the past four seasons, according to the Times.

arts.ttl: Why Leandro Trossard won't be suspended for Arsenal v Leicester City despite controversial sending off
arts.sum: "It's already the second time it has happened in five games, which is really, really worrying if we want to see the best Premier League," his manager told Sky Sports in defiance, before pointing that Jeremy Doku had gone unpunished for their opponents when behaving similarly earlier in opening period. However, Trossard will actually be at Arsenal's disposal for Leicester's upcoming visit to the capital and therefore a worry for Cooper to deal with because he will have actually already served his suspension come Saturday.
